name: Guildmaster Torval Bluehand
description: Guildmaster of the Watercrafters -- middle-aged, practical innovator whose hands are permanently blue-tinged from decades of watercraft enchantment. A Magic-User specialized in water artifice (Craft 85, Arcane Casting 60, Mechanisms 80) rather than battle magic; his guild's enchantments keep the canal-city running.
narrative: Torval Bluehand leads the Guild of Watercrafters, and his trade has marked him: decades of working watercraft enchantments have stained his hands a permanent blue. He is practical and forward-thinking, valuing innovation over tradition -- the kind of artificer-mage who enchants pumps, locks, gondolas and aqueducts rather than hurling fire. His arcane skill is real but applied: Craft and Mechanisms in the 80s, water-aspected Arcane Casting around 60. The Guild is allied with the Order of the Lake Lady and quietly essential to Purewater itself, since the whole canal-city depends on the watercraft his people keep enchanted and running.

extras.tells: hands permanently blue-tinged from decades of watercraft enchantments
extras.role: Guildmaster of the Guild of Watercrafters -- middle-aged, practical, forward-thinking, more interested in innovation than tradition.
extras.magic_tradition: Arcane Casting (CFI Magic-User), specialized in water enchantment / artifice -- enchants boats, locks, pumps and watercraft rather than slinging combat spells. Suggested spells: Animate (water), Repair, Reinforce, Strength (of materials), Float.
extras.faction: Watercrafters Guild -- allied with the Order of the Lake Lady; their enchantments keep the canal-city running.
extras.source: GM-authored from source lore (purewater-organizations.md, Guild of Watercrafters)
